Test Scenario: Add a new Windows Agent server with valid Server Name Type DNS/DHCP Server IP and HTTPS Port
Test Steps:
1. Login to DDI Console with valid credentials
2. Navigate to Configuration > Server Configuration > Windows Agent
3. Click 'Add' / 'Create' button
4. Fill all mandatory fields with valid test data
5. Click 'Save' / 'Submit'
6. Verify success toast and that record appears/updates/removes in the list
7. Backend verify on Windows server using PowerShell (Get-DnsServer.../Get-DhcpServer...) or dig command
Expected Result: Server should be added successfully and displayed in the server list
Remarks: Platform: Windows | Type: Functional | Nature: Positive
